qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion, TTA09_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, TTA09_LIQUIDACION.d_liquidacion FROM TTA09_LIQUIDACION WHERE TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@id} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion, TTA09_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, TTA09_LIQUIDACION.d_liquidacion FROM TTA09_LIQUIDACION WHERE TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND TTA09_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion = {substring_before(#SOURCE:@CODE,\'-\')} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion, TTA09_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, TTA09_LIQUIDACION.d_liquidacion FROM TTA09_LIQUIDACION WHERE TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
